text: Energy certificate status must NEVER be inferred from derived data (e.g. renderedDocument.imageDataUrl existence). The backend buildDashboardSummary uses imageDataUrl as a legacy fallback when the explicit 'status' field is absent, causing false green/completed states on the dashboard. Always use and persist an explicit 'status' field. The download button only renders when 'asset' is non-null, which requires both status==='completed' AND imageDataUrl to be present in DB — so incomplete surveys that lack imageDataUrl never show the download button even when status appears completed.
issue: Bug: energy certificate status shows green when incomplete; no download button even when status is completed
